caption: Groovy instrumental funk rock track with occasional guitar solos that give you a feeling of longing.
This is a very fast and dynamic gipsy track with trumpets and voices, that makes you want to jump.
Childish and innocent orchestral piece of music that conveys joy and happiness and gives a sense of beginning.
An intimate, paused folk song with a male voice, an acoustic guitar and a minimalist arrangement for strings and piano.
A smooth blues song gets exciting as the vocal joins and lets us through his meandering melody.
This song starts with a piano that can be heard from far but then gets exciting with guitar and a fast-paced male vocal.
A retro-futurist drum machine groove drenched in bubbly synthetic sound effects and a hint of an acid bassline.

Positive vibe like something good is happening or about to happen based primarily on finger picking acoustic
Synthetic orchestral piece in the style of a 90s war movie battle scene soundtrack, with prominent bass drums and dry brass section harmonies
A twisty nice melody song by a slide electric guitar on top of acoustic chords later accompanied with a ukelele.
A repetitive musical motif with an electronic keyboard sound which sounds relaxing. Could be used to focus on work.
An instrumental rock track that features bright drums and guitars where vocals are only used for giving a background ambience.
Dynamic and danceable uplifting pop song featuring a catchy beat performed by an acoustic guitar and hand clapls.

A positive instrumental tune to get you up in the morning with a big smile on your face.
Multiple guitars with distorsion, wah-wah play a western country motif. The motif is followed by a more garage  rock guitar motif.
This electronic track combines synths with guitar, builds up slowly and then bangs it with a electric guitar solo.
An ambient mix of reverberant sparkling clean and flamenco style electric guitars, ethereal other worldly vocals, and light conga percussion.
This song reminds me some film and movie scenes in which there is a lot of tension and fear
A strange electronically processed rock song captures your attention even though it sounds like a cheap tune at first.
Typical guitar-folk song with no lyrics, but a choir of voices being used for giving texture.

A neo-classical piece that's like ballroom dancing music, but with some interesting percussion added in. Theme and variation structure with varying instrumentation.
Not really an improvisation but a mixture of tracks at similar loudness levels that can confuse you a bit.
A rock song with a diffuse texture, in which all the instruments mix with the voice and make themselves intelligible to each other.
A quartet of drums, double bass, piano and saxophone performing a slow and beautiful jazz song perfect for an evening in a café.
This smooth jazz track which features a sleepy English vocal is pleasant to listen and perfect for nightdreaming.
Ambient cinematic song, with a glockenspiel lead, sustained by strings, choir and woodwinds. She song feels dreamy and magic, like a Disney movie.

Pop rock song with a hopeful feel and a chorus that audience can sing along to
